An Argument To Write Your Own Boilerplate

Wake up honey, a new coping mechanism has dropped

2023-08-27
Table of Contents

    1. You are at the mercy of code not written by you

    Vendor lock in is pretty much as a guarantee if you decide to forgo researching the right tools for your project.

    You are at the mercy of the vendor’s roadmap, their pricing, their support and their security.

    1. You are at the mercy of code not written by you

    This point is so important I am going to say it twice.

    That’s about it x
